channel.title: Weird Shit Stuff on C0smic's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Weird Shit Stuff on C0smic's Blog

item.title: A New Start
item.description: Whew! I finally got this blog up and running. It took me longer than I expected, but I’m happy with the result. I really hope this blog will help me keep track of my progress and doesn’t end up a big pile of shit. Anyway, let’s see how it goes. o7
